task.name: Fix balance reversal in DELETE /api/expense-transactions/[id]
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/app/api/expense-transactions/[id]/route.test.ts`. All tests in this file must pass, including the newly added one. Then run `npm run lint` â€” must exit 0.

phase.name: Phase 2 â€” New desktop Sheet editor (Fix 2)

task.name: Create EditInstallmentSheet component
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/installments/EditInstallmentSheet.test.tsx`. Must pass. Then `npm run lint` and `npm run build` â€” both must exit 0.

phase.name: Phase 3 â€” Desktop table structural rewrite (Fix 1 + Fix 2 wiring)

task.name: Rewrite InstallmentTable with full ExpenseTable shell
task.action:
Rewrite `src/components/installments/InstallmentTable.tsx`. Keep the file path; fully replace its content.
**Imports** (compose from ExpenseTable):
```ts import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'; import { addDays, format } from 'date-fns'; import { IconEdit } from '@tabler/icons-react'; import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, SearchIcon, SearchX } from 'lucide-react'; import { createColumnHelper, flexRender, getCoreRowModel, getPaginationRowModel, useReactTable, } from '@tanstack/react-table'; import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'; import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'; import { EmptyState } from '@/components/shared/EmptyState'; import { InputGroup, InputGroupAddon, InputGroupInput } from '@/components/ui/input-group'; import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select'; import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table'; import { ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem } from '@/components/ui/toggle-group'; import { type Installment } from '@/hooks/useInstallmentsQuery'; ```
**Props:**
```ts interface InstallmentTableProps { installments: Installment[]; onEdit: (id: string) => void; // delete no longer lives on the row } ```
**Helpers** (keep `formatCurrency` and `computeNextPayment` from the current file).
**Component body:**
1. State: `searchTerm`, `debouncedSearchTerm`, `dateFilter` (default `'view-all'`). 2. Debounce effect (300 ms) copied from `ExpenseTable`. 3. `DATE_FILTER_OPTIONS = { viewAll: 'view-all', thisMonth: 'this-month', thisYear: 'this-year' } as const;` 4. `filteredData = useMemo(...)` that filters `installments` by: - Date filter on `row.installmentStartDate`: - `view-all` â†’ no filter. - `this-month` â†’ month + year match `new Date()`. - `this-year` â†’ year matches `new Date()`. - Search (case-insensitive) across `row.name`, `row.expenseType?.name`, `row.expenseSubcategory?.name`, `row.account?.name`. 5. Columns using `createColumnHelper()` â€” **8 columns**: - `name`: header "Name". Cell renders `{row.original.name}`. - `amount`: header "Total", right-aligned. Cell `
â‚±{formatCurrency(row.original.amount)}`. - `monthlyAmount`: header "Monthly", right-aligned. `
â‚±{row.original.monthlyAmount ? formatCurrency(row.original.monthlyAmount) : 'â€”'}`. - `installmentDuration`: header "Progress". Cell computes `paid` / `duration` and renders the existing progress-bar markup (copy verbatim from the current file including role="progressbar"). - `installmentStartDate`: header "Start date". Cell `row.original.installmentStartDate ? format(new Date(row.original.installmentStartDate), 'MMM d, yyyy') : 'â€”'`. - display column `id: 'nextPayment'`: header "Next payment". Computes via `computeNextPayment`; if `installmentStatus === 'COMPLETED'` renders `'â€”'`. - `installmentStatus`: header "Status". Active â†’ `Active`, Completed â†’ `Completed`. - display column `id: 'actions'`: header "Actions", right-aligned. Cell: ```tsx
onEdit(row.original.id)} >
``` Set `columns` in a `useMemo`. 6. `useReactTable` with `{ data: filteredData, columns, getCoreRowModel, getPaginationRowModel, autoResetPageIndex: false, initialState: { pagination: { pageSize: 10 } } }`. 7. Empty-page safety `useEffect` (copy from `ExpenseTable` â€” clamps `pageIndex` when data shrinks). 8. `PAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS = [10, 20, 30, 40, 50] as const;` and `getPageNumbers` helper (copy verbatim).
**JSX** (copy the wrapping structure from `ExpenseTable`'s return â€” top toolbar with ToggleGroup + InputGroup, the `
` Table wrapper, pagination strip). Change only:
- Table header cells use the 8 headers defined above with `className="p-4"` (right-aligned variants use `className="p-4 text-right"`). - Body cells use `className="pl-4"` (copy from ExpenseTable). - ToggleGroup renders 3 items only (View all / This month / This year) â€” no "This week" item. - `InputGroupInput` placeholder: `Search installments...`. - Table-level empty state (`filteredData.length === 0` AND search/filter applied): `EmptyState` with `icon={SearchX}`, `title="No installments found"`, `description="Try adjusting your search or filters."`, `variant="table"` rendered inside ``. - Pagination "Showing N out of M" text reads the filtered count â€” identical logic to ExpenseTable. - No `DeleteDialog` inside this component. No trash button anywhere.
Export as default.
**Test updates:** Rewrite `src/components/installments/InstallmentTable.test.tsx`: - Render with a multi-row fixture. - Assert search input is present (`placeholder="Search installments..."`); typing filters rows after debounce. - Assert three ToggleGroupItems are present (View all, This month, This year); activating "This year" filters by `installmentStartDate`. - Assert pagination controls are present. - Assert pencil button click calls `onEdit(id)`. - Assert there is no "Delete" button / trash icon in the table. - Assert the `SearchX` empty state renders when the query matches nothing.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/installments/InstallmentTable.test.tsx`. Must pass. Then `npm run lint` and `npm run build` â€” both must exit 0.

task.name: Strip action buttons from InstallmentCard and switch to onClick prop
task.action:
Edit `src/components/installments/InstallmentCard.tsx`.
1. Props â€” replace with:
```ts interface InstallmentCardProps { installment: Installment; onClick?: () => void; } ```
Remove `onEdit` and `onDelete`.
2. Imports â€” remove `Trash2` (from `lucide-react`), `IconEdit` (from `@tabler/icons-react`), and `Button` (from `@/components/ui/button`). Keep `Icons`, `Badge`, date/format helpers.
3. Root div â€” change `onClick={() => onEdit(installment.id)}` to `onClick={onClick}`. Keep `className="money-map-card-interactive flex flex-col gap-3 cursor-pointer"`.
4. Delete the entire bottom block:
```tsx
{ e.stopPropagation(); onEdit(installment.id); }}>
{ e.stopPropagation(); onDelete(installment.id, installment.name); }}>
```
Nothing else changes. The status badge, info grid, and progress bar are untouched.
**Test updates** â€” rewrite `src/components/installments/InstallmentCard.test.tsx`: - Remove mock `onEdit`, `onDelete` props. - Add `onClick` mock. - Assert clicking the card root calls `onClick` once. - Remove any assertions that query for Edit / Delete buttons (they should not exist). - Keep assertions on name, monthly amount, progress bar, status badge.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/components/installments/InstallmentCard.test.tsx`. Must pass. Then `npm run lint` â€” must exit 0.

phase.name: Phase 5 â€” Tab container rewire (Fix 3 wiring + Fix 4)

task.name: Wire Sheet + Drawer split in InstallmentsTabContent and remove tab-level delete
task.action:
Edit `src/components/installments/InstallmentsTabContent.tsx`.
1. Imports: - Add `import EditInstallmentSheet from '@/components/installments/EditInstallmentSheet';` - Remove `import DeleteDialog from '@/components/shared/DeleteDialog';` (no longer used here).
2. State â€” remove: - `deleteDialogOpen`, `setDeleteDialogOpen` - `installmentToDelete`, `setInstallmentToDelete` - `handleDeleteRequest` - `handleDeleteConfirm` Also remove `deleteInstallment` and `isDeleting` from the `useInstallmentsQuery({...})` destructure (the editors pull these themselves).
3. Rename `editDrawerOpen` / `setEditDrawerOpen` â†’ `editOpen` / `setEditOpen` for clarity (optional but preferred; if renaming is skipped, leave variable names but they must still drive both Sheet and Drawer).
4. `handleEdit` unchanged â€” `setSelectedInstallmentId(id); setEditOpen(true);`.
5. Mobile card list â€” change `` to ` handleEdit(i.id)} />`.
6. Desktop table â€” change `` to ``.
7. Editors â€” replace the single `EditInstallmentDrawer` mount with a responsive split:
```tsx
```
8. Delete `` block entirely.
9. Open `src/components/installments/EditInstallmentDrawer.tsx`. In its `handleDeleteConfirm` (or equivalent), ensure the first line is:
```ts toast.success("Installment deleted successfully", { duration: 5000 }); ```
followed by `deleteInstallment(installmentId); setDeleteDialogOpen(false); onOpenChange(false);`. If the toast is already present, leave it. If the order is different, match the `ExpenseTable.handleDeleteConfirm` pattern (toast.success BEFORE the mutation call, since the mutation is fire-and-forget).
**Test updates:**
- `src/components/installments/EditInstallmentDrawer.test.tsx` â€” if it asserts on toast behavior, update to assert that `toast.success` is called with exactly `"Installment deleted successfully"` when the delete is confirmed. - If an `InstallmentsTabContent.test.tsx` exists, update it to reflect the removed `DeleteDialog` and the new Sheet/Drawer split. If it does not exist, no change.
task.verify:
Run the targeted tests:
``` npx vitest run src/components/installments/InstallmentsTabContent.test.tsx npx vitest run src/components/installments/EditInstallmentDrawer.test.tsx ```
(Skip files that don't exist.)
Then run the full suite: `npx vitest run`. Must be green.
Then `npm run lint` and `npm run build` â€” both must exit 0.
Finally, update `docs/installment-management-verification.md` by appending a new section `## QA Fix Pass` that documents:
- Each of the 5 fixes, file(s) touched, test(s) added/modified, and the verification command that confirmed green. - Manual smoke test results for steps 1â€“9 in spec Â§12.3, especially step 9 (child delete balance reversal).
